title: Stream write not working properly

comments.author: lifan0127
comments.body: Looks like this is related to an earlier issue from 2016: https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/209

comments.body:
@lifan0127 No, I am not getting chunks for every row instead chunks are sending only after the worksheet is committed.
is there any way I can do stream for every row committed?
